series_metadata.series_description: Budget information and reports to the Office of Budgetand Management (OBM) and the Legislative Budget Office (LBO) detailing fiscal yearexpenditures for JFS programs. Includes detailed spreadsheets, narrative descriptions,budget line item data and disbursement variance reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office and in records center, or Improvement Plans have been implemented and audit findings considered resolved (by Auditor Of State and Federal agencies), and provided next audit is completed and report is released by AOS. ; Electronic: superseded,obsolete or replaced, thendestroy
